variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11807 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11807 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11807 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 89.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 62.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 8.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 199.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 190.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF1857 Air, Secondary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11807
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF1857 Air, Secondary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11807
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF1857 axial seal secondary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
